mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatroom (member_id, chatroom_title, chatroom_max_member) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{chatroomTitle}, #{chatroomMaxMember})
mapper.select: SELECT c.chatroom_id AS chatroomId, c.member_id AS memberId, c.chatroom_title AS chatroomTitle, c.chatroom_max_member AS chatroomMaxMember, c.chatroom_created_at AS chatroomCreatedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_member cm WHERE cm.chatroom_id = c.chatroom_id AND cm.chat_member_status = '참여중') AS currentMemberCount FROM chatroom c WHERE c.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId}

SELECT c.chatroom_id AS chatroomId, c.member_id AS memberId, c.chatroom_title AS chatroomTitle, c.chatroom_max_member AS chatroomMaxMember, c.chatroom_created_at AS chatroomCreatedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_member cm WHERE cm.chatroom_id = c.chatroom_id AND cm.chat_member_status = '참여중') AS currentMemberCount,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_member cm2 WHERE cm2.chatroom_id = c.chatroom_id AND cm2.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm2.chat_member_status = '참여중' ) AS joined
false AS joined
FROM chatroom c ORDER BY c.chatroom_created_at DESC
